title: Data Explorer
description: The Data Explorer enables researchers to interactively query and visualise patient data across connected data sources. It includes data quality dashboards, aggregate reporting, and source profiling tools that help users understand the structure, completeness, and reliability of their clinical data before conducting analyses.
tips: Run the Data Quality Dashboard on any new data source before building cohorts to identify completeness or conformance issues early.
Use the Source Profiler to assess the temporal coverage and record density of your data, informing appropriate look-back period settings.
Filter quality reports by domain to pinpoint specific areas of concern, such as missing lab values or incomplete drug exposure records.
Compare data quality metrics across multiple data sources to select the most appropriate sources for a given research question.
Export data quality results to share with data governance teams or include in study documentation.
